description: Rise of Avalon Patch 7 - Hotfix 1 (21 October 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Resolved an issue where Crafting Stations do not regenerate their Crafting Capacity (* Please note that the UI will still display incorrectly. You will need to change zones and return to see the Crafting Capacity regenerate for now. We aim to fix the UI as soon as possible.)

subitems.text: Update (22.10): This has been fixed for Windows / Mac / Linux. Mobile fix will be coming soon.

items.text: Resolved an issue where some trap templates in the Corrupted Dungeons were double layered, making fire laser traps emit additional lasers and Lava traps
